overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character emerges from an underpass filled with trash bags, walks through covered arcades with holographic advertisements, crosses a busy intersection, and continues along sidewalks beneath elevated highways and past towering skyscrapers with bright billboards.

events.description: emerges from trash-filled underpass into covered pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a concrete underpass area piled with garbage bags, moving toward an opening with neon lights visible ahead

entered.detail: large pile of black and blue garbage bags accumulated under the concrete structure
heavy concrete overpass structure with weathered purple stains on the ceiling
thick structural support column for the overpass
colorful neon illumination visible at the end of the underpass tunnel

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow concrete underpass filled with piled trash bags. The camera moves forward through the dimly lit space, emerging into a slightly more open covered walkway where colorful neon lights become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with overhead neon installation

events.description: overhead circular neon structure becomes visible, casting colorful light patterns
approaching open intersection with visible crosswalk and traffic

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered walkway beneath a massive circular neon structure, approaching a street intersection

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the building entrance

entered.detail: massive spiral of multicolored neon tubes hanging overhead in a circular pattern
large rectangular planter with spiky plants
wooden bench with a person sitting near the building facade
tall structure with large digital advertisements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian arcade dominated by a spectacular circular neon installation overhead. The concrete pillars of the underpass give way to an open view of the street ahead, where a tall billboard tower marks the intersection. The lighting shifts from dim artificial to vibrant neon colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and moving traffic

events.description: stepping onto crosswalk as vehicles wait at the intersection
turning slightly right while continuing to cross the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing a wide city intersection at the crosswalk, navigating between pedestrians and watching for traffic

notable_agents.action: blue car waiting at the intersection with headlights on
pedestrian in orange jacket crossing from the opposite direction

entered.detail: broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
elevated highway structure with vehicles passing overhead
large digital billboard displaying advertisements on a tall pillar

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection as the camera steps onto the crosswalk. Vehicles wait at the traffic lights while pedestrians cross in opposing directions. The circular neon structure recedes behind as the camera advances across the striped crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk, passing beneath towering billboards and an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside busy street with futuristic skyscrapers

events.description: passing a distinctive green skyscraper with red horizontal accents

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past pedestrians, with the camera occasionally panning to admire the towering futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: man in white tank top walking in the same direction

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with green-tinted glass facade and prominent red horizontal structural elements
distinctive orange-colored textured pavement of the pedestrian walkway
tall modern street lamp illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along an orange-textured sidewalk beside a busy street with moderate traffic. A massive green skyscraper with distinctive red horizontal accents dominates the right side of the frame. The camera moves past various pedestrians and continues along the urban corridor, with digital billboards and street lights lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway with dense urban canyon walls

events.description: entering the shadow of a massive elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the elevated highway structure alongside other pedestrians, with the camera moving through a denser crowd

notable_agents.action: person with green hair and sunglasses walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure with multiple lanes passing overhead, casting deep shadows
large illuminated advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves beneath a massive elevated highway that creates an urban canyon effect. The green skyscraper recedes as the camera enters the shadow of the overpass. Neon billboards illuminate the right side while concrete support pillars line the walkway. The crowd density increases slightly as the camera continues forward through this covered urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, claustrophobic underpass into the vibrant, towering scale of a neon-lit futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving through a narrow concrete passage filled with trash bags, gradually emerging into a covered pedestrian arcade where the lighting shifts from dim artificial tones to the glow of a spectacular circular neon installation. As the camera steps out from the arcade, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection filled with waiting vehicles and pedestrians, passing beneath massive billboards and an elevated highway. The path then continues along an orange-textured sidewalk dominated by a towering green skyscraper with red accents before turning back into the shadows of a massive overpass. Finally, the camera advances through this urban canyon, where concrete support pillars and bright digital billboards line a crowded walkway.
